author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 9 COMPLETE. All 6 agents delivered: 1) CubeCL + WGPU + ROCm backends (13 tests). 2) ferrotorch-train with Learner/Metrics/Callbacks (51 tests). 3) LLM modules: RoPE, SwiGLU, KV cache, TransformerEncoder/Decoder (42 tests). 4) Quantization INT8/INT4/UINT8 (15 tests). 5) Gradient accumulation + 7 activations + 3 losses + Muon optimizer (52 tests). 6) Operation fusion engine with PTX generation (22 tests). Total new: ~195 tests, 2 new crates (ferrotorch-cubecl, ferrotorch-train).
